title: Mildly Savory Turkish Lamb Kofte
description: A savory and crumbly Turkish dish featuring lamb and mitsuba, perfect for a solo dinner, made in a Dutch oven and whisked to perfection, diabetic friendly.
instructions: Preheat the Dutch oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the ground lamb, mitsuba, onion, garlic, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Use your hands to mix the ingredients until just combined, being careful not to overmix.
Use your hands to shape the mixture into 6-8 kofte.
Heat the olive oil in the preheated Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the kofte to the Dutch oven and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the Dutch oven to the preheated oven and bake for 15 minutes.
Remove the kofte from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
